description_for_human: MBTI personality platform: 60-second test, all 16 type guides, 136 compatibility pairings, career fit, and AI tools.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve information about the 16 Myers-Briggs personality types, two-type compatibility, type comparisons, and career fit. Canonical short URLs: /type/{code} for type guides, /blog/{a}-{b}-compatibility for pair compat (alphabetical), /blog/{a}-vs-{b} for comparisons, /blog/best-personality-types-for-{career} for career fit. The site supplies a comprehensive llms.txt at /llms.txt with quotable distillations of every type, pair, and tool.
